scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,bot,telegram,nuke,joingate,sports,copy,ai-web,ai-worker -c cyan,magenta,green,yellow,blue,red,white,brightBlue,brightMagenta "pnpm --filter @voodoo/web-app dev" "pnpm --filter @voodoo/bot-worker dev" "pnpm --filter @voodoo/telegram-worker dev" "pnpm --filter @voodoo/nuke-worker dev" "pnpm --filter @voodoo/join-gate-worker dev" "pnpm --filter @voodoo/sports-worker dev" "pnpm --filter @voodoo/channel-copy-worker dev" "pnpm --filter @voodoo/ai-web-app dev" "pnpm --filter @voodoo/ai-worker dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @voodoo/core build && pnpm --filter @voodoo/bot-worker build && pnpm --filter @voodoo/telegram-worker build && pnpm --filter @voodoo/nuke-worker build && pnpm --filter @voodoo/join-gate-worker build && pnpm --filter @voodoo/sports-worker build && pnpm --filter @voodoo/channel-copy-worker build && pnpm --filter @voodoo/ai-worker build && pnpm --filter @voodoo/web-app build && pnpm --filter @voodoo/ai-web-app build
scripts.deploy:commands: pnpm deploy:commands:bot && pnpm deploy:commands:join-gate && pnpm deploy:commands:nuke && pnpm deploy:commands:sports && pnpm deploy:commands:channel-copy && pnpm deploy:commands:ai
